properties.query: let _src = CyberSixgillAlertsV2_CL | extend ParentId = '', UniqueId = Id, SubAggregateAlertId = long(null), SubAlertDetails = dynamic({});let _subs = CyberSixgillAlertsV2_CL | where SubAlertsCount > 0 and isnotnull(SubAlerts) | mv-expand _sub = SubAlerts to typeof(dynamic) | extend ParentId = Id,   UniqueId = strcat(Id, '__', tostring(_sub.aggregate_alert_id)),   SubAggregateAlertId = tolong(_sub.aggregate_alert_id),   SubAlertDetails = _sub | project-away _sub;union _src, _subs
